title: Hooking Hookshot
description: This datapack/mod adds hookshot and grappling hook! Can be compatible with vanilla too but also includes optional 3D models
body:
This datapack adds a hookshot, which has a range of 10 blocks, and a grappling hook!
An optional resource pack is available, but isn't needed if you download the mod version, or if you only use the vanilla, server-side features of the datapack

To get started,

- Use **/function hookshot:hookshot** to get the 3D hookshot **(requires resource pack or all-in-one mod)**
  
- Use **/function hookshot:grappling_hook** to get the 3D grappling hook **(requires resource pack or all-in-one mod)**
  
- Use **/function hookshot:grappling_hook_vanilla** to get the vanilla grappling hook (use a lead texture) **(compatible with vanilla client, server side only, no resource pack needed)**
